Frostharbor's windows go out one, by one, by one, following the run of the streets — dock to church, upper street to lower — regular as a man going door to door snuffing lamps. The church spire darkens last, its prayer cut off mid-sentence by the wind. There is no burning, no broken wall. A frozen town does not even fall down: Frostharbor simply cools, whole and quiet, into a well-kept specimen on the strait's edge. Snow comes down and covers street and roof-ridge and the fish-oil torches on the palisade, like someone tidying a room when the thing is done. You stand on the ridge, perhaps with the heart still against your chest beating colder and colder, perhaps with nothing at all. In a lull of the wind, the whole snowfield is so quiet that all that remains is your own heartbeat — thump, thump: the only warm sound within a hundred miles. And beneath the ice, something hears it, and puts its helm over.

nodes.title: 凍鐵之冠
nodes.directive: 惡結局之二(貪婪之因,與棄守成因不同):玩家奪心自用或投靠艦隊,被寒冷加冕為新的提督。力量是真的,代價是體溫、牽掛與名字被一一凍去,最終坐上旗艦望向下一座亮著燈火的港。寫誘惑兌現後的空洞,結在自己已認不出的倒影上。
nodes.narration: 心臟貼上你們胸口的瞬間,寒冷不再是敵人了。風雪繞著你們分開,冰面在腳下鋪出平整的路,十一艘黑帆齊齊降下半帆,那是艦隊的臣服禮。莫爾凡的殘軀在你們面前躬身,軍帽摘下,露出一張終於可以休息的臉:「艦隊交割完畢。」他化作黑冰碎在風裡,語氣裡竟有如釋重負。你們登上旗艦,掌心貼著舵輪,整支艦隊的感官便湧進來:冰下的洋流、風的走向、還有遠方岸上每一團體溫的位置,亮得像星圖。力量是真的,誰也奪不走。只是體溫再也回不來了;只是霜港的方向漸漸想不起來了;只是某天夜裡,你們俯身看艙窗上的倒影,那張結著白霜的臉端正、威嚴、陌生——你們認了很久,沒認出那是誰。艦隊在冰下巡弋,不飢不渴,不老不死。直到某個冬夜,瞭望位報告前方有一座亮著燈火的港口,而你們聽見自己用陌生的嗓音下令:「熄了它。」
nodes.narrationEn: The moment the heart touches your chest, the cold stops being your enemy. The blizzard parts around you; the ice lays a level road beneath your feet; eleven black sails dip to half-mast in a single motion — a fleet making its obeisance. Morvane's ruin bows before you and lifts off his cap, baring the face of a man finally permitted to rest. 'The fleet is handed over.' He breaks apart into black ice on the wind, and there is relief in the sound of it. You board the flagship and lay a palm on the wheel, and the fleet's senses pour into you: the currents beneath the ice, the wind's intentions, and far away on every shore the position of each small knot of body-heat, bright as a chart of stars. The power is real. No one can take it from you. Only, warmth never comes back; only, the way to Frostharbor slowly slips your mind; only, one night, bending to the cabin window, you study the reflection there — a frost-rimed face, composed, commanding, unfamiliar — and after a long while you still cannot say whose it is. The fleet patrols beneath the ice, never hungry, never thirsty, never aging, never dying. Until, some winter night, the lookout reports a harbour ahead lit with lamps, and you hear your own voice, in a stranger's timbre, give the order: 'Put it out.'

中期.objective: 在霜港鎮打探守塔人與燈塔的真相,備齊登上北岬的裝備與路線
中期.context: 燈塔鑰匙已到手,但冰橋崩裂、亡者船隊逼近;鎮上的酒窖、漁市與教堂各藏著一段往事。
中期.stakes: 黎明前燈塔若不亮,幽靈艦隊將循居民體溫登岸。
中期.objectiveEn: Learn the truth of the keeper and the lighthouse in Frostharbor, and gather the gear and the route for the climb to North Cape
中期.contextEn: The lighthouse key is in hand, but the ice bridge has shattered and the fleet of the dead draws near; the town's cellar, fish market and church each hold a piece of the past.
中期.stakesEn: If the lighthouse is not burning by dawn, the ghost fleet will come ashore, homing on the townsfolk's body-heat.

後期.objective: 穿越冰橋登上北岬,決定燈塔以什麼重新點亮
後期.context: 守塔人與紅披風女孩的秘密已然揭開;火盆裡的冰藍心臟仍在跳動。
後期.stakes: 每拖一刻,黑帆更近一分;點燈的代價,得有人來付。
後期.objectiveEn: Cross the ice bridge to North Cape, and decide what the lighthouse is to be relit with
後期.contextEn: The secret of the keeper and the girl in the red cloak lies open; the ice-blue heart in the brazier is still beating.
後期.stakesEn: Every moment of delay brings the black sails nearer; someone must pay the price of the light.

結局.objective: 見證霜港的黎明或長夜
結局.context: 燈塔的火與女孩的記憶,已依你們的抉擇定下歸屬。
結局.objectiveEn: Witness Frostharbor's dawn, or its long night
結局.contextEn: The lighthouse fire and the girl's memories have found their fates, as your choices decreed.
結局.stakesEn: The ending is set. There is no turning back.
